title: The Grid — Embodied
excerpt: A field of glowing LED-grid panels on steel totems — a physical, embodied grid of light.
description: The Grid — Embodied, presented at ADE (Amsterdam Dance Event) 2025. Modular grid panels of light, mounted on slender steel totems, fill the space as a field of glowing screens — turning the digital grid into something physical and embodied, bathing the room in deep red.
credits: Photography: Alex Heuvink. ADE — Amsterdam Dance Event, 2025.
